general_readings.text: Peter replied, 'Repent and be baptized, every one of you, in the name of Jesus Christ for the forgiveness of your sins. And you will receive the gift of the Holy Spirit.'
general_readings.theme: Baptism brings forgiveness and the Holy Spirit

general_readings.text: Or don't you know that all of us who were baptized into Christ Jesus were baptized into his death? We were therefore buried with him through baptism into death in order that, just as Christ was raised from the dead through the glory of the Father, we too may live a new life.
general_readings.theme: Baptism as dying and rising with Christ

general_readings.text: Jesus came from Galilee to the Jordan to be baptized by John. [...] And when Jesus was baptized, just as he was coming up out of the water, he saw the Spirit of God descending like a dove and settling on him.
